description_long: This house features a low, single-story profile with a complex hip roof covered in dark gray shingles. The exterior walls are finished in a light, textured material, with some sections displaying a stone accent and others a smooth white surface. The front facade includes a large rectangular window, a smaller set of windows, and a recessed entryway with a single door. A paved area extends from the front, with a distinct orange-tiled section suggesting a porch or patio. Windows and doors are asymmetrically placed, contributing to a modern suburban appearance. The overall structure is compact, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements.
description: A single-story modern house with a hip roof, light textured walls, stone accents, and asymmetrical windows. The front features a paved entry and a recessed doorway.
description_view_0: This view shows a side of the house with a single door, a large rectangular window, and the hip roof's shingle pattern.
description_view_1: The rear side is mostly plain, with no visible windows or doors, and a continuation of the hip roof.
description_view_2: The front view highlights the main entryway, a large window, a stone accent wall, and a paved area with orange tiles.
description_view_3: This side is mostly blank, showing the expanse of the hip roof and a small section of the paved area extending from the front.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed single door with a paved approach and orange-tiled porch, minimal decorative elements
